name: semantic-seo-builder
description: Koray Semantic SEO pipeline for local businesses. 5-phase research (SerpAPI+Tavily+Apify), entity mapping, topical authority, content system, technical+local SEO. Weekly pipeline with Tavily pre-research. Monthly audit with live rank checks. Gemini 2K image generation with GPS geotag. Integrates claude-seo and claude-blog.
